title: #claude Chat vs. Cowork: Biggest 3 differences
summary: Claude Cowork is a desktop application that enables direct file access from a user's computer without cloud upload restrictions, supports larger context windows than Claude Chat, and generates ready-to-use output files directly in folders. The tool removes file count and size limits while preserving conversation details better than the chat-based predecessor.
